HGSS.490.0000:
Falkner: Out of all the Trainers
out there, the best Trainer would\r
have to be my dad.\f
HGSS.490.0001:
Janine: Ha!
You don’t know a thing!\f
The best Trainer in the world is Koga,
one of the Elite Four!\r
Namely--my dad!\f
HGSS.490.0002:
Falkner: You are mistaken.
My dad treats Poké...\f
HGSS.490.0003:
Janine: Please stop this!
Why don’t you just admit that my dad\r
is the true Trainer!\f
HGSS.490.0004:
Falkner: You were listening, right?
You agree my dad is\r
greater, right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.490.0005:
Falkner: You do?
Just as I thought!\f
You know something?
I’m sure we’ll enjoy talking about\r
my dad!\r
Here is my number!\f
HGSS.490.0007:
Falkner: Give me a call on Saturday
morning if you want to hear about\r
my dad!
HGSS.490.0008:
Falkner: You don’t?
I thought you were smarter than that.\f
Oh, well.\r
You’ll change your mind eventually.
HGSS.490.0009:
Falkner: So, you did change your mind.
You now think my dad\r
is greater? [0200,0000]
HGSS.490.0010:
Falkner: Hey, why don’t we take
a picture together? [0200,0000]
HGSS.490.0011:
Falkner: All right!
Are you ready?\f
HGSS.490.0013:
Falkner: That’s all right.
I’ll just take one with my dad...
HGSS.490.0014:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
HGSS.490.0016:
I’m here to buy Bloom Mail to send
to my girlfriend.
HGSS.490.0017:
You know what?\f
Tunnel Mail is finally available
at this department store!\f
Previously, it was only sold
in Violet City.
HGSS.490.0018:
Gifts to Express Yourself!
4F: Wiseman Gifts
